supportive.name: Frozen Moment
tiers: Suspend a dying creature (at 0 HP but not dead) in magical ice. They do not make death saving throws until the ice thaws at the end of your next turn.
Use this effect as a reaction when a creature drops to 0 HP — encasing them for up to 1 minute. They are stable and cannot be targeted while frozen.
A willing creature may be frozen in time for up to 1 hour. While encased they are immune to all effects but also cannot act, speak, or be detected by magical means.

Once per long rest, cast this effect on yourself — while frozen you are invulnerable and regain 1d4 hit dice per hour spent in stasis. You may set a condition to thaw automatically (a specific sound, time elapsed, or touch from a named creature).

supportive.name: Iceheart
tiers: Gain resistance to cold damage for 1 minute. While active, your Concentration cannot be broken by cold damage.
Once per long rest, when you are hit by cold damage, you may instead gain temporary HP equal to the damage that would have been dealt.
You gain immunity to the Frightened condition and cannot be Charmed while standing on ice or frozen terrain.
When reduced to 0 HP, you may instead shatter into ice — becoming a frozen statue immune to all damage for 1 minute, then reforming at half HP as the frost around you reconstitutes your body.

control.name: Glacial Grasp
control.description: Your frost clings with oppressive force.
tiers: When you deal cold damage, the target's movement speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of your next turn.
On a failed Constitution save, the target becomes Restrained by ice until the end of their next turn.
The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw to break free, or the Restraint persists until the end of your next turn (maximum 1 minute of Concentration).
The ice spreads — one additional creature of your choice within 10 feet of the original target must also save or be Restrained by the same creeping frost.

control.name: Permafrost Curse
control.description: Chill the soul as well as the body.
tiers: If a creature fails a saving throw against your effect, they cannot regain hit points until the end of your next turn.
The cursed creature also suffers disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws and Constitution saving throws for 1 minute.
Creatures that fail are vulnerable to cold damage for 1 minute. Repeat Constitution save at end of each turn to end early.
Mark a creature with Cursed Ice — if they die while marked, they shatter into frozen fragments and cannot be revived by any means short of Wish or divine intervention.

control.name: Glacial Creation
control.description: Your ice takes form beyond elements.
tiers: Create a small frozen object or structure (up to a 5-foot cube) that lasts 1 minute. It provides half cover and is slippery — creatures that walk on it must succeed on a Dexterity save or fall prone.
Shape ice into walls, bridges, or defensive barriers up to 20 feet long — AC 15, 20 HP per 5-foot segment. Structures last 10 minutes or until destroyed.
Craft a Frozen Construct — an animated ice elemental servant (CR 2) that follows your commands. Once per day, lasts 1 hour or until destroyed.
Create a Glacial Golem (CR 5) that acts on your initiative and obeys your commands, or — if cast within a region of perpetual cold — summon an Icebound Denizen, a native elemental of that region.

complementEffects.name: Deep Freeze
complementEffects.description: Cold doesn't kill in an instant — it builds.
complementEffects.effect: On a hit or failed saving throw against the primary effect, the target gains 1 Frost Stack. At 2 Frost Stacks their movement speed is reduced by 15 feet. At 3 Frost Stacks they are Restrained until they succeed on a Constitution saving throw (DC equals your Verum DC) or receive fire damage. Frost Stacks fade after 1 minute without additional cold exposure.
upgrades: Level 5+: Each application of Deep Freeze now applies 2 Frost Stacks instead of 1.
Level 11+: At 3 Frost Stacks the target is Paralyzed rather than Restrained, and stacks persist for the full duration of the encounter.

complementEffects.name: Frost Veil
complementEffects.description: A thin shell of ice forms between you and the world's heat.
complementEffects.effect: When the primary effect resolves, one ally of your choice within 30 feet gains temporary hit points equal to your spellcasting modifier + your proficiency bonus. While these temporary HP remain, the ally has resistance to fire damage.
upgrades: Level 5+: Temporary HP increases to twice your spellcasting modifier + your proficiency bonus, and the ally also gains resistance to cold damage.
Level 11+: You may choose two allies to receive this benefit, and each is additionally immune to being set on fire or affected by environmental heat while the temporary HP persists.

complementEffects.name: Flash Freeze
complementEffects.effect: When the primary effect hits or a target fails their saving throw, the ground in a 10-foot radius around them flash-freezes — becoming difficult terrain until the end of your next turn. Creatures in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw against your Verum DC or be knocked prone.
upgrades: Level 5+: The frozen terrain persists for 1 minute, and creatures that enter it for the first time on a turn must make the Dexterity save or be knocked prone.
Level 11+: The radius increases to 20 feet, and creatures that are knocked prone are also Restrained until they succeed on a Strength check against your Verum DC.
